name: gstreamer

about.summary: Library for constructing graphs of media-handling components
Library for constructing graphs of media-handling components

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1
context:
  version: "1.28.2"

recipe:
  name: gstreamer_and_plugins
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  - url: https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/src/gstreamer/gstreamer-${{ version }}.tar.xz
    sha256: ce5cd44d4ffeafdcc3dddaa072b2179c0b7cb1abf4e6c5d18d4375f8a39fe491
  - url: https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/src/gst-plugins-base/gst-plugins-base-${{ version }}.tar.xz
    sha256: 4db76b3619280037a4047de7d9dbb38613a4272dcc40efb333257124635a888d
    target_directory: plugins_base
  - url: https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/src/gst-plugins-good/gst-plugins-good-${{ version }}.tar.xz
    sha256: 1ace2d8ec74f632d82eab5006753a27fe0c2402db4ca94d63271e494b62f50bf
    target_directory: plugins_good

build:
  number: 2

outputs:
  - package:
      name: gstreamer
    build:
      #activate_in_script: true
      script:
        file: install_gstreamer
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }} 
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
        - pkg-config
        - if: unix
          then: bison
          else: m2-bison
        - if: unix
          then: flex
          else: m2-flex
        - meson
        - ninja
        - gettext-tools
        - gobject-introspection
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then: cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - python <${{ 3.15 }}
        - setuptools <81
      host:
        - glib
        - if: not linux
          then: libintl-devel
        - libiconv
        - zlib
      run:
        - ${{ pin_compatible("glib") }}
      run_exports:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gstreamer', upper_bound='x.x') }}
      ignore_run_exports:
        by_name:
          - if: build_platform != target_platform
            then: python
          - if: build_platform != target_platform
            then: python_abi
    tests:
      - script:
          - gst-inspect-1.0 --version
          - gst-launch-1.0  --version
          - gst-stats-1.0 --version
          - gst-typefind-1.0 --version
          - if: unix
            then: test -f $PREFIX/lib/girepository-1.0/Gst-1.0.typelib
          - if: win
            then: if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\girepository-1.0\\Gst-1.0.typelib exit 1
    about:
      summary: Library for constructing graphs of media-handling components
      description:
      license: LGPL-2.0-or-later
      license_file: COPYING
  - package:
      name: gst-plugins-base
    build:
      #activate_in_script: true
      script:
        file: install_base_plugins
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }} 
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
        - pkg-config
        - meson
        - ninja
        - gettext-tools
        - gobject-introspection
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then: cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - python <${{ 3.15 }}
        - setuptools <81
        - freetype
      host:
        - if: linux
          then: 
            - libgl-devel
            - libegl-devel
            - libdrm
            - libxcb
            - alsa-lib
            - xorg-libxfixes
            - xorg-libxext
            - xorg-xorgproto
            - xorg-libx11
            - xorg-libxrender
            - xorg-libxdamage
            - xorg-libxxf86vm
            - xorg-libxau
            - xorg-libxshmfence
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gstreamer', exact=True) }}
        - glib
        - zlib
        - if: not linux
          then: libintl-devel
        - libogg
        - if: unix
          then:
            - libpng
            - libopus
        - libvorbis
        - expat
        - pango
      run:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gstreamer', exact=True) }}
      run_exports:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gst-plugins-base', upper_bound='x.x') }}
      ignore_run_exports:
        by_name:
          - if: build_platform != target_platform
            then:
              - python
              - python_abi
    tests:
      - script:
          - if: unix
            then: 
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstallocators-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstapp-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstaudio-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstfft-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstpbutils-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstriff-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstrtp-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstrtsp-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstsdp-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgsttag-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libgstvideo-1.0${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/girepository-1.0/GstVideo-1.0.typelib
          - if: win
            then: 
                - if not exist %LIBRARY_BIN%\\gstallocators-1.0-0.dll exit 1
                - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\girepository-1.0\\GstVideo-1.0.typelib exit 1
          - gst-inspect-1.0 --plugin volume
          - gst-inspect-1.0 --plugin pango
    about:
      summary: GStreamer Base Plug-ins
      description: |
        GStreamer Base Plug-ins is a well-groomed and well-maintained collection of
        GStreamer plug-ins and elements, spanning the range of possible types of
        elements one would want to write for GStreamer.
      license: LGPL-2.0-or-later
      license_file: COPYING
  - package:
      name: gst-plugins-good
    build:
      #activate_in_script: true
      script:
        file: install_good_plugins
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }} 
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then: cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - pkg-config
        - meson
        - ninja
        - gettext-tools
        - python <${{ 3.15 }}
        - setuptools <81
      host:
        - if: linux
          then: 
            - libgl-devel
            - libegl-devel
            - libdrm
            - libxcb
            - pulseaudio-client
            - bzip2
            - xorg-xorgproto
            - xorg-xorgproto
            - xorg-libxfixes
            - xorg-libxext
            - xorg-libx11
            - xorg-libxrender
            - xorg-libxdamage
            - xorg-libxxf86vm
            - xorg-libxau
            - xorg-libxshmfence
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gstreamer', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gst-plugins-base', exact=True) }}
        - if: not linux
          then: libintl-devel
        - openssl
        - libxml2-devel
        - glib
        - if: linux64
          then: jack >=1.9.7
        - if: unix
          then:
            - lame
            - libpng
            - libvpx
        - if: linux64 or osx
          then: mpg123
        - zlib
        - if: not ppc64le
          then: libsoup
        - libjpeg-turbo
        - expat
        - if: win
          then: liblzma-devel
      run:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gstreamer', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gst-plugins-base', exact=True) }}
        - if: not ppc64le
          then: 
            - libsoup
            - glib-networking
        - if: linux
          then: 
            - xorg-libxfixes
            - xorg-libxdamage
        - if: win
          then: liblzma-devel
      run_exports:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('gst-plugins-good', upper_bound='x.x') }}
      ignore_run_exports:
        by_name:
          - if: build_platform != target_platform
            then: python
          - if: build_platform != target_platform
            then: python_abi
    tests:
      - script:
          - if: unix
            then: 
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstalpha${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstdebug${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstjpeg${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstlame${SHLIB_EXT}
                - test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstlame${SHLIB_EXT}
                - gst-inspect-1.0 --plugin vpx
          - if: linux64
            then: test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstjack${SHLIB_EXT}
          - if: linux64 or osx
            then: test -f $PREFIX/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstmpg123${SHLIB_EXT}
          - if: linux
            then: test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/gstreamer-1.0/libgstpulseaudio${SHLIB_EXT}
          - if: win
            then: 
                - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstalpha.dll exit 1
                - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstdebug.dll exit 1
                - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstjpeg.dll exit 1
                - if not exist %LIBRARY_LIB%\\gstreamer-1.0\\gstspectrum.dll exit 1
          - gst-inspect-1.0 --plugin alpha
    about:
      summary: GStreamer Good Plug-ins
      description: |
        GStreamer Good Plug-ins is A collection of plug-ins you'd
        want to have right next to you on the battlefield.
        Shooting sharp and making no mistakes, these plug-ins have it
        all: good looks, good code, and good licensing.  Documented and
        dressed up in tests.  If you're looking for a role model to
        base your own plug-in on here it is.
      license: LGPL-2.0-or-later
      license_file: COPYING

about:
  summary: Library for constructing graphs of media-handling components
  license: LGPL-2.0-or-later
  license_file: COPYING
  homepage: https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/
  repository: https://cgit.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gstreamer/tree/
  documentation: https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/documentation/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - tjwilli58
    - yishai1999
    - andfoy
    - mingwandroid
    - msarahan
    - tschoonj
    - scopatz

about.summary: Library for constructing graphs of media-handling components
